channel.title: Age of the Strongman
channel.description: Intelligence Squared — Age of the Strongman

item.title: The Age of the Strongman: Understanding Trump, with Anne Applebaum (Part Two)
item.description: The morning after Donald Trump’s victory over Kamala Harris in the U.S. presidential election, The New York Times front page declared: ‘America…

item.title: The Age of the Strongman: Understanding Netanyahu, with Anshel Pfeffer (Part Two)
item.description: In November 2022, Benjamin Netanyahu returned to power in Israel after winning his sixth election. Propped up by a bloc of far-right and…
